meta.source: Adventurer and Slime game Sprites — ADVENTURER
meta.attribution: Adventurer and Slime game Sprites — Segel, https://opengameart.org/content/adventurer-and-slime-game-sprites
meta.notes: Upstream ships per-frame 1333×936 PNG canvases. Every frame was cropped to the fixed union bounding rect (x 160..925, y 36..812) across the idle/run/slash/jump sets and box-filter downscaled ÷6 into uniform 128×130 cells, preserving the in-canvas baseline so all strips share one ground line.
